research.aesthetic: Actual verified site/Instagram photography signature could not be fully established from the available public research: no official Instagram handle was verified and the official site imagery was not accessible in the research. The confirmed public visual footprint is therefore minimal and early-stage rather than a mature repeatable feed. Based on the brand’s verified positioning, any reproducible visual system should be audited against live assets before final use; the appropriate direction is model-led maternity realism in Indian domestic and everyday settings: sunlit bedrooms, balcony corners, tiled floors, neutral sofas and wooden chairs; warm natural side light; soft contrast and skin-real colour; low-to-medium prop density with real-life items such as phones, totes, water bottles, sonography files, books, chai cups and house slippers; mid-body and three-quarter crops showing bump fit, drape, nursing access and movement; more real pregnant/postpartum models than product-only flat lays; no nursery clichés, baby-shower props, glamour lighting, over-saturated influencer grading or shapeless nightwear styling.
